description: Whether or not you make it to the slopes this year, this timepiece from aspen captures the spirit and beauty of a mountain side covered in pristine snow. Luxury watchmakers Aspen have used the most precise technology and the most exquisite materials to create stylish watches perfect for the sophisticated you.Case diameter: 31 mmCase thickness: 3 mmDial shape: RoundWarranty: Two YearsSteel round case with mother of pearl bezelMother of pearl and steel strap with a press claspBlack dial with metallic handsBranding on the dialScrew to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering or in light rain
